p.strong: Self-monitoring data flow from kernel-space probe execution to userspace dashboard display
p.em: Intel Manual Quality | Layout Engine: ELK | Version: 1.2.2

g.title: Stack context allocated on probe entry: ~128 bytes

div.p: The userspace aggregator uses a timerfd loop to trigger bpf_map_lookup_elem exactly every 1000ms. This prevents high overhead from the monitoring tool itself.

g.title: Stack context allocated on probe entry: ~128 bytes
